author: 2ZD1
content: Merged locally to main at fce0f34. Includes signed agent commit cf65a35 (workspace conversion + crossbridge-protocol crate, 23 tests pass) and orchestrator commit fce0f34 (one-line useless_format clippy fix in pre-existing v1 route.rs). cargo test --workspace clean, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean. Cron auto-merge by orchestrator. No push to origin.
